experiment: Phase 6 — Entropy-Gated V4 Push to 95%+ (100 epochs)
purpose: Push EG toward backprop parity. Wider layers, MLP probe, full decorrelation.

model.name: Entropy-Gated V4
model.probe: 2-layer MLP with ReLU + Dropout(0.2), Adam lr=1e-3 + cosine scheduler

changes_from_v3: MLP probe instead of linear (128 hidden + ReLU + Dropout)
Chunked full decorrelation instead of sampled 50 pairs

configurations_tested.name: EG-V4 with data augmentation
configurations_tested.notes: Augmentation HURTS local learning. The noisy inputs confuse reconstruction signal.

configurations_tested.name: EG-V4 without data augmentation
configurations_tested.notes: BEST RESULT. Clean inputs → better reconstruction → stronger learning signal.

trajectory: Monotonically increasing with very slow convergence after ep 60
verdict: BREAKTHROUGH. 97.46% with purely local feature learning. Gap to backprop: only 0.58%.
key_findings: Data augmentation hurts local learning (-1.5% vs no aug)
MLP probe recovers ~5% more accuracy than linear probe (from features of same quality)
Convergence is very slow after epoch 60 — diminishing returns
The 0.58% gap may be irreducible for this architecture with local-only features
